{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322030551BE334B62189F4FB6D394"}"},"total":2651},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7526476772463100697","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是我最近看到的最好的武侠文，主角虽然是王爷，但不嚣张跋扈，不刻意描写朝堂上的尔虞我诈，却通过剧情写出了身居高位的如履薄冰，更可贵的是有人情味，希望作者不要断更。🙏🙏"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752400258,"group_id":"7436631809556761624","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3KMJGLH9lE9/0McjwSzfjo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702960&x-signature=tRnwf4v8J2ikrGzX%2B9K6cLn0GrM%3D","user_id":"106097451846","user_name":"爱吃枇杷蜂蜜的星辉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106097451846","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436631809556761624","book_info":{"abstract":"皇子➕架空➕多女主➕轻松诙谐

“桃李春风一杯酒，江湖夜雨十年灯。”
……
大宁承和年间，群雄并起，苍生劫，山河错。

南北三朝，卿相王侯、才子名妓，浓墨山河图。

庙堂、沙场、江湖。

书生国士报君恩，将军百战枯万骨，剑客拔剑挽天倾。

锦绣太平二十年，有年轻人从幻梦中醒来。

盛世醉人，好梦难醒，有美人恩重，佳人多娇。

天下倾覆，山河倒悬，有头颅热血，与子同袍。

且看那天家次子，七凶兽随身，以剑为笔，再画这十万里江山！

……
嗯，以上简介是全书唯一一处正经的地方了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b5f072cd7237bdd42df142499747b9ad","author":"溜达的长刀","author_id":"","book_id":"7436631809556761624","book_name":"剑饮不知醉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a08068","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7436727289225691672","read_count":"148399","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1556872"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"588","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,搞笑轻松,穿越,多女主,剑修","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d69f22e6c73561d00fbae8807c982fa5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303951&x-signature=ln5jkD4RBcPh%2Fv3CDaEkZJO%2BExc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3781918113140958","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"373"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322030551BE334B62189F4FB6D394"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39026,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":32660},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7563562023053902616","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到400章，没有发现任何毒点。
虽然是架空高武世界，但作者很明显有自己的大纲，文字功底深厚，剧情发展平稳且不跳脱，多女主的感情戏写的不错，避雷工作也做得很好，没有漏女、死女、送女等问题。
个人感觉在粮草到仙草之间，推荐阅读。实际评分9.2其实略低，值得9.4分。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761031031,"group_id":"7436631809556761624","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0TcXodrBgbhVlukzuLR4jg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/256546e365ef4658acd265d075ef780c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707109&x-signature=aEflExgS%2FZ%2BeNIluqMNS6510EkE%3D","user_id":"237947417789927","user_name":"来给我个好评"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"237947417789927","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436631809556761624","book_info":{"abstract":"皇子➕架空➕多女主➕轻松诙谐

sten_duration":7,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":75010,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":27926},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7591545921107215166","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"依旧好看啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767550554,"group_id":"7436631809556761624","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3424339799052699"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436631809556761624","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"816"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读28小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":101072,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7571678933038334782","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好的书，目前看到三百三十多章，战力没有崩坏，非常合理。然后每个角色都有血有肉，哪怕是反派，文笔真的很好，不愧是语文老师。之前还担心多女主作者很容易描写不好或者同质化，然而并没有。读了这么多多女主的书，很少能让我清晰的记住每个女主名字和特点个性的，然而这本书做到了，可以说每个女主我都非常喜欢。江湖，朝堂，沙场，都刻画的很好，希望作者继续加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762921831,"group_id":"7436631809556761624","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"日更一万字的作者一枚呀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwqfXqZlX2wzhhNmtS/sxQD4CngvRLu+Ej1Yx+Q0P3z4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/650791a9435b48c99d87c2a10417d3d8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703496&x-signature=l1HoBcoONTkKEuy8umKHUkFvLZc%3D","user_id":"3424339799052699","user_name":"云呀晕呀晕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3424339799052699","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436631809556761624","book_info":{"abstract":"皇子➕架空➕多女主➕轻松诙谐
